item.title: Day 1: Creating the Show
item.description:
Hello! I am XsquiddokidX, a developer, artist, and a new animator. I’m not a professional animator—I’m just starting out and learning as I go. In this blog series, I’ll be documenting my journey and teaching you how to create your own animated show from scratch.

Prerequisites

Before we dive in, make sure you have:

  1. OpenToonz installed.
  2. A Creative Mindset.

Step 1: Setting up the Workspace

First, download OpenToonz for your OS (I’m using macOS). Once installed, open it and create a new project.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hello! I am XsquiddokidX.

Over the past year, I’ve been diving deep into both coding and animation. On the coding side, I’ve been active on GitHub, working on various projects and sharpening my development skills. More recently, I’ve started my journey into animation, beginning with the basics like the “Bouncing Ball” exercise in OpenToonz.

I’m not a professional animator—I’m just starting out and learning as I go, and this blog is my way of documenting that progress and sharing what I learn with you.
